title: FTGU: Modded Creepers
description: A Remodel resouce-pack that aims to make modded creepers consistent with the FTGU creeper
body:
## SUPPORTED

**_-Caverns and Chasms-_**

- Deeper remodel

- Peeper remodel

**_-Nirvana-_**

- Reefer remodel

**_-Mutant Monsters-_**

- Mutant creeper retexture

## Planned
- Born in chaos
- Myxini's mobs
- Royal variations
- You can always give me suggestions of wich other mods support

(Creeper overhaul compat not planned, Alex caves compat not planned)

Abnormal thanks to Bagel, Ninni, Reda and blob for make it easier for me
